mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, level, started_at, expires_at, created_at, updated_at FROM u_user_membership WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO u_user_membership (user_id, level, started_at, expires_at, tenant_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{level}, #{startedAt}, #{expiresAt}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE u_user SET membership_expire_at = #{expireAt}, membership_plan = #{plan} WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM u_user WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
